x-enumeration-literals.name: Clearing System
x-enumeration-literals.description: A system that validates, matches, and prepares financial transactions for settlement between participating institutions.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Netting System
x-enumeration-literals.description: A system that offsets multiple obligations between parties to determine a single net payable or receivable position.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Settlement System
x-enumeration-literals.description: A system that transfers funds, securities, or assets to finalize financial transactions between parties.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Reconciliation System
x-enumeration-literals.description: A system that compares and verifies records, balances, transactions, or positions between different systems or organizations to identify discrepancies.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Trading System
x-enumeration-literals.description: A system that supports the execution, matching, routing, and management of financial market trades and orders.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Payment Processing System
x-enumeration-literals.description: A system that authorizes, routes, validates, and processes payment transactions between customers and financial institutions.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Securities Processing System
x-enumeration-literals.description: A system that manages the issuance, custody, transfer, and settlement of securities transactions.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Card Processing System
x-enumeration-literals.description: A system that manages card-based transaction authorization, clearing, settlement, and account updates.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Treasury Management System
x-enumeration-literals.description: A system that manages liquidity, cash positions, investments, funding, and financial risk activities for an institution.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Foreign Exchange System
x-enumeration-literals.description: A system that supports currency trading, exchange rate management, and foreign exchange transaction settlement.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Liquidity Management System
x-enumeration-literals.description: A system that monitors and controls available funds and liquidity positions across accounts and institutions.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Risk Management System
x-enumeration-literals.description: A system that identifies, measures, monitors, and controls financial, operational, or credit risks.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Collateral Management System
x-enumeration-literals.description: A system that records, allocates, monitors, and manages collateral assets supporting financial obligations.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Account Management System
x-enumeration-literals.description: A system that maintains customer or institutional account records, balances, limits, and account activities.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Fraud Detection System
x-enumeration-literals.description: A system that monitors transactions and activities to identify suspicious behavior and potential fraudulent actions.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Messaging System
x-enumeration-literals.description: A system that exchanges standardized financial or operational messages between systems, institutions, or networks.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Reporting System
x-enumeration-literals.description: A system that generates operational, regulatory, financial, or management reports from processed data.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Customer Service System
x-enumeration-literals.description: A system that supports customer interactions, inquiries, complaints, onboarding, and servicing activities.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Workflow Management System
x-enumeration-literals.description: A system that coordinates, automates, and tracks operational processes, tasks, and approvals.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Core Banking System
x-enumeration-literals.description: A centralized banking system that manages accounts, deposits, loans, payments, and daily banking operations.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Compliance Management System
x-enumeration-literals.description: A system that monitors activities and controls to ensure adherence to regulatory, legal, and policy requirements.
